Our Services

Professional irrigation solutions for every need

Irrigation System Installation

Custom-designed sprinkler and drip systems for Sacramento homes and landscapes.

Learn More →

Irrigation System Repairs

Fast, durable fixes for common valley irrigation problems.

Learn More →

Seasonal Adjustments

Climate-appropriate watering schedules for Sacramento's distinct seasons.

Learn More →

Drip Irrigation Solutions

Precision watering for drought-tolerant landscapes and garden beds.

Learn More →

Smart Controller Installation

Weather-responsive irrigation technology for Sacramento yards.

Learn More →

Backflow Testing & Repair

Certified backflow prevention services meeting Sacramento County requirements.

Learn More →
Summit Irrigation

Trusted irrigation professionals serving Sacramento, CA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
